gt_sql: SELECT T1.name, T2.points FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY T1.year ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT r.name, res.points
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
ORDER BY r.year ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: Which was Lewis Hamilton first race? What was his points recorded for his first race event?
